node.title: Uber System Design Interview Coming up

topic.title: Uber System Design Interview Coming up

post.content: I have a system design interview coming up in 3-4 days, have gone through the Alex Xu volume 1 book but still not feeling confident enough, can anyone recommend what can be done at this point to optimise my performance during interview, I want to either see good mock interviews or give some myself, or seeing in general good quality system design interviews, any adivse would be great!\nBackground - 3 years experience, interviewing for SDE 2 role at Uber.
Hi OP, I am also preparing for system design interview. We can take each other mock interview.
You can use dezyn.io to create system design diagrams using AI. I have used it and it was extremely helpful.\nhttps://www.dezyn.io/shared/d959b201-de35-403c-892c-fc7c435befe5
